query:
SELECT 'Total Users' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM users
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Users with Stripe Customer ID', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE stripe_customer_id IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Active Subscriptions', COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Subscriptions (all time)', COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Credits Purchased (USD cents)', COALESCE(SUM(amount_paid_cents), 0) FROM credits WHERE amount_paid_cents > 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Credit Transactions', COUNT(*) FROM creditTransactions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Total Music Video Jobs', COUNT(*) FROM music_video_jobs
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Completed Jobs', COUNT(*) FROM music_video_jobs WHERE status = 'completed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Failed Jobs', COUNT(*) FROM music_video_jobs WHERE status = 'failed'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Rendering Jobs', COUNT(*) FROM music_video_jobs WHERE status = 'rendering';
